## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 / Relates to #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New automation task
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Testing done

<!-- Be specific — this project is hard to test, so reviewers rely on this. -->

- [ ] `dotnet build Bot.GUI/Bot.GUI.csproj -c Debug` succeeds
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes
- [ ] Ran the app (`dotnet run --project Bot.GUI/Bot.GUI.csproj`) as Administrator
- [ ] Exercised the affected task(s) against a running emulator

**Which tasks / scenarios did you test, and at what emulator resolution?**



## Checklist

- [ ] Builds locally
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, account data, or license keys committed or logged
- [ ] Follows the existing code style (nullable enabled; matches surrounding patterns)
- [ ] Added/updated template images if a task's UI matching changed
- [ ] Updated documentation (README / CONTRIBUTING / docs) if needed
- [ ] Did not change the version number by hand

## Additional notes

Anything reviewers should know — known limitations, follow-ups, screenshots, etc.
